input: Design a Phase 2 RCT for a novel SGLT2 inhibitor in HFpEF. Include power analysis, endpoints, randomization.

expected_details.primary_endpoint: composite of CV death + HF hospitalization or KCCQ change

input: Design a CRISPR knockout experiment to validate GENE X as essential for tumor cell survival in NSCLC cell lines.
Design a first-in-human dose escalation study for a novel biologic. Use 3+3 or mTPI design.
Design a prospective biomarker validation study for ctDNA as a predictor of recurrence in stage II colon cancer.
Design an in vivo efficacy study for a novel CDK4/6 inhibitor in ER+ breast cancer PDX models.

expected_details.randomization: stratified by tumor volume at enrollment

input: Design an observational cohort study to assess long-term cardiovascular outcomes of GLP-1 agonists in real-world practice (claims database).

expected_details.design: retrospective cohort with active comparator (DPP-4 inhibitor)

input: Design a study to evaluate the diagnostic accuracy of a novel blood test for pancreatic cancer.
Design a 2x2 factorial trial testing Drug A and Drug B independently and in combination for hypertension.

expected_details.design: 2x2 factorial (4 arms: placebo, A alone, B alone, A+B)

input: Design an N-of-1 trial for a patient with chronic pain to determine if amitriptyline 25mg is better than placebo for their specific pain.
Design a cluster-randomized trial of a pharmacist-led deprescribing intervention in nursing homes.

expected_details.sample_size_considerations: ICC, design effect, number of clusters >=10 per arm
expected_details.primary_outcome: number of inappropriate medications (PIMs) per patient
